data.requirement: Integrate batter/bowler_player_stats with detailed_player_data using match_id and player_name (aliased to match detailed_player_data.player)
data.reason: Original requirement fails due to column name mismatch (player vs player_name) and lack of common join key. Match-level stats require match_id-based joining.

visualization.requirement: Binned heat maps showing performance by opposition team and venue categories (top 10 venues only)
visualization.reason: Original 303 venue categories make axes unreadable. Binning and top-N selection maintains readability while preserving matchup analysis.
